details: Pre-Prompt-20 dispatch released EXCEPINFO strings before structured capture; version, bitness, workbook count, and Ready were therefore unavailable for this one required baseline.
No second Add call was made before the message-filter and retry layer; Add is classified non-idempotent and never automatically replayed.

The fixture opened and closed through an owned session. The 15-second observer was too short for natural exit; the exact process was absent when checked immediately after the test harness returned. Future fixture controls use a 30-second exit bound.
